title: PlasmaMod (UNMAINTAINED)
description: A fabric mod that adds a full set of new tools and mobs including a boss that is all plasma themed.
body:
# Description
A fabric mod that adds a full set of new tools and mobs including a boss that is all plasma themed.

# Features
## Custom Tools

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Plasma Pickaxe, Axe, Sword, Shovel and Hoe

</details>


## Custom Mobs

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Plasmatron Spider

</details>
